accessibilityCoverage.item: receipt source selector exposes radio semantics
payload textarea has visible label and keyboard entry path
verification button remains disabled until receipt source and package requirements are met
result panels keep deterministic category-specific copy
camera scan is not required because QR paste fallback is the accepted v0.1.0 path

limitations: No physical camera matrix is claimed in v0.1.0.
Browser matrix is focused on component-level desktop/mobile behavior; full Playwright E2E remains optional until a dedicated FEAT-152 block is added.
Manual mode is copy/paste or segmented paste, not true short-code lookup.
